inputs.label: standard
inputs.content: 'The Three-Act Structure Is Holding Your Documentary Back' — a YouTube video arguing that documentary filmmakers should abandon three-act structure in favor of observational approaches. 12 minutes.

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.content: New podcast episode about freelance journalism rates and how to negotiate them.

inputs.label: european
inputs.content: 'How Rotterdam Rebuilt Itself: A Visual History' — a long-form magazine article with original photography documenting Rotterdam's post-war architecture and urban planning from 1945 to present. Includes interviews with Dutch architects and city planners.
inputs.audience: Architecture and urban planning professionals in Europe
